basics.name: Jasmine Chan
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.A. in Information and Computer Sciences at the University of Hawaii at Manoa. I expect to graduate in May 2028.

education.institution: University of Hawaii at Manoa, Honolulu, HI

work.company: UH Manoa Information and Computer Sciences Department
highlights: Assist students in ICS 211 lab with Java programming assignments by actively applying programming knowledge to understand students’ work and identify areas for improvement.
Provide constructive feedback and guide students in problem solving and debugging programs.
Promote a welcoming learning environment by encouraging students to ask questions, explain their thought processes, and engage in available Java programming resources.
Hold hours outside of class to offer additional one-on-one or group support to students.

work.company: UH Manoa Curriculum and Research Development Group
highlights: Provide computer assistance by troubleshooting software and printer issues.
Input and maintain both digital and physical records through data entry and file organization.
Utilize spreadsheets to efficiently organize, filter, and sort school and survey data based on specific criteria.
Apply technical writing skills to develop clear and concise manuals and documentation to support training and onboarding.
Navigated pharmacy software to accurately input and process prescriptions while applying problem solving skills to resolve insurance rejections and troubleshoot coverage issues.
Maintained patient confidentiality in compliance with HIPAA regulations by limiting disclosure of patient information to approved contacts and safely disposing of sensitive documents.
Provided exceptional customer service in a fast-paced pharmacy environment.
Organized drugs and products to optimize inventory management and accessibility.

awards.title: Provost Achievement Scholarship
awards.summary: Selective, higher-tier merit scholarship awarded to recognize academic excellence and community impact among incoming freshmen.

awards.title: Manoa Academic Merit Scholarship
awards.summary: Received the highest scholarship award based on excellent high school academic performance and maintaining a GPA of 3.6 or higher.
